MAMAMOO（韓語：마마무）原屬WA Entertainment旗下的四人女子團體，2015年經紀公司與 Rainbow Bridge World (簡稱RBW)合併，成員有頌樂、玟星、輝人及華莎。「MAMA」是不論種族或國家的所有初生嬰兒學會的第一句詞彙，而「MOO」為嬰兒牙牙學語時發出的擬聲詞，意即MAMAMOO期望為大眾帶來超越國籍性別，且展現原始以及本能性的音樂。
MAMAMOO於2014年6月19日正式透過M Countdown以歌曲《Mr.曖昧模糊》出道，官方粉絲名為「MOO MOO」，官方應援物為蘿蔔造型手燈「MOO棒」(蘿蔔韓文為무，音似Moo)，代表色為綠白相間。
MAMAMOO有一個固定站位，由左至右依序是玟星、頌樂、輝人及華莎。在問候時，隊長頌樂會先說「一、二、三，I Say~」，所有成員便以無伴奏合唱的方式唱出「MAMA MAMA MOO~，大家好，我們是MAMAMOO。」和聲時四人會依序互看彼此的眼睛，最後將食指放在人中前當作鬍子。

Mamamoo Earn Best U.S. Sales Week Yet With 'Red Moon,' First Appearance on Heatseekers Albums Chart
The world is eagerly anticipating the "blood moon" lunar eclipse this weekend, and Mamamoo's Red Moon is earning the girl group new chart accolades.

The powerhouse quartet score their best U.S. sales week to date with their new Red Moon EP, which sold 1,000 copies in the week ending July 19 and debuts at No. 4 on Billboard's World Albums chart. Mamamoo have landed six entries on World Albums to date, starting with 2015's Pink Funky (which peaked at No. 7 on the chart), Melting (No. 8) and Memory (No. 12) both from 2016, followed by 2017's Purple (which hit No. 1, their only chart-topper so far), and Yellow Flower from earlier this year (No. 7).

Mamamoo's best U.S. sales week also scores the group their first appearance on the Heatseekers Albums chart -- a ranking that sees far fewer K-pop acts. Starting at No. 25, Mamamoo become just the third female K-pop act to enter Heatseekers this year following Twice and Red Velvet. (It should be noted that Blackpink would have also landed on Heatseekers if their Square Up EP had charted lower than No. 100 on the Billboard 200 since Heatseekers only ranks up and coming musicians that have had albums place below the top 100 of the Billboard 200.)

Tickets for MAMAMOO’s upcoming concerts sold out in the blink of an eye!

On July 30 at 8 p.m. KST, tickets went on sale for MAMAMOO’s third solo concert in Seoul. In keeping with the group’s “Four Seasons Four Colors” project, which began with their spring mini album “Yellow Flower” and continued with their summer release “Red Moon,” the upcoming “4 Season S/S” concerts will feature performances with the themes of spring and summer.

Within just two minutes of the tickets’ release, both of MAMAMOO’s upcoming Seoul concerts had completely sold out, proving the group’s continuing popularity. The concerts, which will be held on August 18 and 19 at the SK Olympic Handball Gymnasium in Seoul, are the group’s first solo concerts since their “<MOOSICAL> Curtain Call” concert last year.

MAMAMOO also recently announced that they would be holding a concert tour in Japan this October, as part of their upcoming official Japanese debut.

The group is currently promoting their new mini album “Red Moon,” featuring the hit title track “Egotistic.”

「容不樂」頌樂的身邊，總有個笑爛的玟星？
因為逗姐姐，是玟星的人生樂趣~

看到標題，是否會覺得百思不解呢？對MAMAMOO粉絲們來說，這根本就是很常見的情況哦！小編本身就是很喜歡看MAMAMOO成員們之間的互動，其中「姐姐Line」頌樂和玟星的相處模式，簡直就像是漫畫一樣搞笑啦~

Sarang Oppa之前分享過不少頌樂和日月之間的趣事，小編就順道讓大家「溫習」一番吧！
－ 頌樂和玟星談及冷戰後和解的關鍵物！
－ 頌樂開Solo演唱會，玟星準備的三種驚喜活動！
兩人作為官配CP，除了被飯們稱作「日月CP」之外，她們還為自己取名為「容蜜星蜜」，也開了許多雙人直播節目呢~從練習生時期開始的不熟悉，甚至是一度產生誤解，到互相扶持、幫忙和照顧，如今她們情同姐妹，更是一對SoulMate呢~

不過啊，玟星是個非常調皮的女孩，即使頌樂是隊長和姐姐的身份，但由於兩人年齡相差一歲，感情也非常好，玟星似乎都是在一旁吐嘈、欺負和玩鬧頌樂，讓對方哭笑不得，卻又捨不得在大庭廣眾責罵妹妹，只能默默地「受欺負」啦~

因此，在飯拍或節目中不難發現，只要頌樂擺出「容不樂（容仙悶悶不樂）」的表情，旁邊肯定就是笑得超燦爛的玟星啦~不信？小編就送上一些例子~





粉絲們笑說頌樂脾氣真的很好，即便玟星有多調皮，她也只能默默地在一旁生悶氣，接著就若無其事地繼續進行活動啦~




頌樂被拍到悶悶不樂的照片蠻多的，但她偶爾也有還手的時候啦！




最近，MAMAMOO舉行了三場簽售會，在最後的活動中一樣發生了不少「容不樂」情況，兩人還差點打起來了呢~

先是從玟星故意戳頌樂腋下的部分開始…


再來就是頌樂在忙著解釋遊戲的玩法和規則時，玟星卻在後面拿著吹泡泡器玩，讓她氣得搖頭走掉！（feat.玩好玩滿的文三歲）


遲遲無法開始遊戲的四人，一直讓頌樂非常不耐煩，直接捶胸表示已經煩躁了啦！


最後，兩人更是一度開始打架了，幸好輝人把頌樂攔住，否則直接上演「拳王之戰」！


說了這麼多，其實頌樂和玟星也只是很常鬧而已啦，她們的關係一直都很好，而「容蜜星蜜」的粉絲們也知道她們是多麼的黏TT吧？呵呵~不過啊，小編只想跟玟星說，真的別再鬧你的頌樂姐姐了，她可是忍了很多次啦~

Girl group @RBW_MAMAMOO ,representative of beagle dols. You can’t really anticipate what they will do.
All members are doing good but nowadays,Hwasa’s the one shinning from her appearance on‘I Live Alone’. The program that gave her the overwhelming response from the public.

With her charm she have shown on “I Live Alone” she has gotten many love calls for CFs after that.
We were not sure what will happen to the charm that Hwasa has, the character she has is not just a made up one. It was the natural side of hers even during predebut days.

@RBW_MAMAMOO Company RBW’s CEO Kim Do Hoon said “Actually, I’ve seen many people around me who has Hyejin as their name, often creates trouble. I had the thought of ‘She might create troubles in the future’. Chosen her as a member of Mamamoo but I’m receiving lots of pressure.”

KDH “I told the girls to keep their hair long so that they’ll be able to try out different styles and in case of change of concept. But Hyejin came in the next day with her short hair and asked me “How do I look?”

KDH “Many people got to know @RBW_MAMAMOO through Hwasa. First up, isn’t she doing a great job. Few days ago I told her “Our mischievious Hyejinnie congrats on being successful” She’s a kid that warms your heart the more you see her.

KDH “Not just to Hyejin, I’ve also told the other members to just be themselves and they don’t have to act pretty when they’re on entertainment shows. But I Guess those kids will still do that without me telling them to.”
https://twitter.com/lunaestrellados/status/1032133430501240832

Hwasa of K-pop girl group Mamamoo has become one of South Korea’s hottest female idols because of her singing and rapping, her striking stage performances, and, more recently, her role as the country’s mukbang (food-eating video) queen.
